title: corybas iridescens
intro: Corybas iridescens, also known as the fairy orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in digestion. Corybas iridescens is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which are considered a safe and natural way to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
